root_text.an10.239:1.3: Sammādiṭṭhi, sammāsaṅkappo, sammāvācā, sammākammanto, sammāājīvo, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati, sammāsamādhi, sammāñāṇaṁ, sammāvimutti—
root_text.an10.239:1.4: rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime dasa dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an10.239:1.1: “For insight into greed, ten things should be developed.
translation_text.an10.239:1.3: Right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom.
translation_text.an10.239:1.4: For insight into greed, these ten things should be developed.”
